title: Template with column Permissions and Restrictions?
excerpt: Is there a way to make boards from a template and keep the restrictions and permissions? Or do I need to adjust them all when I create a new board from this template?

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to make boards from a template and keep the restrictions and permissions? Or do I need to adjust them all when I create a new board from this template?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jappa - create a template from a board will retain all of its permission settings (board/column level).

Here is a great article on working with board templates that should give you all the information you need:

monday.com board templates – Support

Hope this helps,
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: When I use the template. The column restriction is in place. But only I can adjust the column Not the other people I selected…

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jappa - subscribers/owners of the board are not maintained when created from a template. You are assigned as the only owner as the creator of the board.

If you create the board from an automation, you have the ability to set the board owners and subscribers automatically. For example:

image1482×142 15.6 KB

image1091×627 44.1 KB

Hope this helps!
Mark

posts.author: Jappa (Jasper Schulten)
posts.cookedHtml: Will try it out! Thank you for your responses
